properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: JWT signing secret used for access and refresh token validation.

properties.name: lantu.encryption.key
properties.description: Application-level symmetric encryption key for sensitive data.

properties.name: lantu.security.encryption-key
properties.description: Security encryption key used by field encryptors and related security components.

properties.name: lantu.system.integration-mock
properties.description: Whether to enable local integration mock behavior.

properties.name: lantu.gateway.binding-expansion.agent
properties.description: Whether to expand MCP bindings for agent resources.

properties.name: lantu.gateway.binding-expansion.merge-active-skill-mcps
properties.description: Whether invoke requests merge MCPs from active skills.

properties.name: lantu.gateway.capabilities.max-mcps-per-aggregate
properties.description: Maximum MCP count allowed in an aggregate tools response.

properties.name: lantu.gateway.capabilities.max-tools-per-response
properties.description: Maximum tool count returned in a capabilities response.

properties.name: file.upload-dir
properties.description: Local directory used for uploaded files.

properties.name: cors.relax-localhost
properties.description: Whether localhost origins are allowed when explicit origins are not configured.
